patch:
--- a/priority_encoder_64bit.v
+++ b/priority_encoder_64bit.v
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
   input [63:0] request_vector,
   output reg [5:0] priority_index
 );
-  always @(valid_bit) begin
+  always @(valid_bit or request_vector) begin
     if (~valid_bit) begin
       priority_index = 6'h00;
     end else begin
